pundit.name: Alexi Lalas
pundit.take:
**Devin, look at me. Your draft choices are more confusing than a VAR decision on a beautiful summer day!**

The Czech Republic faces South Africa in what promises to be a clash of underwhelming expectations. Mustard Boy picked Czechia hoping for some magic, but I’ve got news for you, Zach: they're as exciting as watching paint dry in a deserted stadium. Ghost Pepper, Devin, your pick of South Africa is like choosing a backup singer to headline your fantasy concert. This matchup is the battle of the banal, but mark my words: Czechia will edge out a win with the precision of an eighties mullet and all the flair of 1994, leaving Devin once again questioning his life choices. 

Now, let me tell you something: Switzerland against Bosnia is a match loaded with consequence. Zach, you opted for the Swiss, the ever-reliable but utterly uninspiring bankers of the football world. You're playing safe, and safe is boring. On the other hand, Devin, Bosnia? Really? Drafting Bosnia is like picking your grandmother’s meatloaf recipe—old, tired, and with no hope of success on the world stage. Switzerland will march over Bosnia like a freight train, proving once again, Ghost Pepper, that your managerial choices are about as effective as a plastic fork in a steakhouse.

pundit_takes.headline: Mustard Boy Set for Tactical Masterclass Against Ghost Pepper
pundit_takes.subtitle: Zach believes picking Swiss over Swiss all will outwit Devin.

pundit_takes.headline: Rafe's Strategy of Drafting Non-Qualifiers Brilliantly Yields Zero Points
pundit_takes.subtitle: The Noisemaker continues to prove ignorance is bliss, or not.

pundit_takes.headline: Bubba G's Hope Rests on Canada to End Losing Streak
pundit_takes.subtitle: Gunner is optimistic his Tier 3 team will provide salvation.

pundit_takes.headline: Backpass Assassin Commands Group A as England Crusades Ahead
pundit_takes.subtitle: Gayden remains undefeated in living room battles with teenage son.

rome_analytics_quotes: Gunner's slipping hard; the kid Rafe's chaos shattered his 24% win chance.
Rafe's Tier-1 dependency is 0.33; his roster screams 'all eggs in Germany's basket'.
Devin gets annihilated by Rafe's Mexico and Scotland; head-to-head is a 6-point landslide.
The sim found its kryptonite: predicting a 15-year-old's random World Cup dynasty.
